title: Better Nostalgia Panorama
description: A panorama taken in a real (modded) copy of Alpha 1.1.2_01.
body:
I was mildly annoyed by the Vanilla Tweaks Nostalgia panorama not actually being taken in an old nuclear green Alpha version — the dark leaves and various other telltale signs it was taken in a modern version greatly detract from it. And the inclusion of Herobrine is kinda annoying.

So, I went to the trouble of modding a1.1.2_01 to hide the HUD, remove the camera translation, hardcode the FOV to 90, pause the water animation, freeze the clouds, and force the chunk render distance to Far with Normal fog. Some NBT editing later, the result is this! (It's a jar mod, so I can't release it. I may rewrite it as a nilmod if there is interest.)

The panorama was taken at 124.2, 90.62, 284.62 on world seed `2076245608584353582`.
